parameters.output: ={{ (() => { const body = $json.body ?? $json; const pick = (...values) => values.find((value) => typeof value === 'string' && value.trim()); const transcriptText = pick(body.transcript_text, body.transcript?.text, body.transcript?.content, typeof body.transcript === 'string' ? body.transcript : null, body.meeting?.transcript_text, body.data?.transcript_text, body.data?.transcript?.text, body.content?.transcript_text); return transcriptText ? 1 : 0; })() }}

parameters.command: ={{ (() => { const body = $node["Webhook"].json.body ?? $node["Webhook"].json; const pick = (...values) => values.find((value) => typeof value === 'string' && value.trim()); const eventType = pick(body.event_type, body.eventType, body.type, body.trigger?.type) || 'unknown'; const title = pick(body.title, body.meeting?.title, body.meeting_name, body.meeting?.name); const occurredAt = pick(body.occurred_at, body.occurredAt, body.started_at, body.meeting?.started_at, body.meeting?.start_time, body.timestamp); const stableId = pick(body.source_ref, body.meeting_id, body.meeting?.id, body.transcript_id, body.transcript?.id, body.conversation_id, body.conversation?.id, body.data?.meeting_id, body.data?.conversation_id); const slug = (title || 'call').toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, '-').replace(/^-+|-+$/g, '') || 'call'; const stamp = new Date(occurredAt || Date.now()); const iso = Number.isNaN(stamp.getTime()) ? new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 16).replace(/[:T]/g, '-') : stamp.toISOString().slice(0, 16).replace(/[:T]/g, '-'); const sourceRef = stableId ? `krisp:${stableId}` : `krisp:${iso}-${slug}`; const titleStamp = new Date(occurredAt || Date.now()); const normalizedTitle = title || `Call - ${(Number.isNaN(titleStamp.getTime()) ? new Date() : titleStamp).toISOString()}`; const audit = { received_at: new Date().toISOString(), source: 'krisp', event_type: eventType, source_ref: sourceRef, title: normalizedTitle, decision: 'ignored', ignored_reason: 'missing_transcript_text', failure_reason: null }; const path = '/home/node/.n8n/krisp-ingest.ndjson'; const line = JSON.stringify(audit).replace(/'/g, `'"'"'`); return `mkdir -p "$(dirname \"${path}\")" && printf '%s\\n' '${line}' >> "${path}"`; })() }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ (() => { const body = $node["Webhook"].json.body ?? $node["Webhook"].json; const pick = (...values) => values.find((value) => typeof value === 'string' && value.trim()); const toArray = (value) => Array.isArray(value) ? value : (value == null ? [] : [value]); const normalizeName = (value) => { if (typeof value === 'string') return value.trim(); if (value && typeof value === 'object') return pick(value.name, value.full_name, value.display_name) || ''; return ''; }; const participants = toArray(body.participants ?? body.meeting?.participants ?? body.attendees ?? body.meeting_attendees).map(normalizeName).filter(Boolean); const actionItems = toArray(body.action_items ?? body.actionItems ?? body.summary?.action_items ?? parameters.responseBody: ={{ (() => { if (!$node["Call memory-api"].json.error) return $node["Call memory-api"].json; const body = $node["Webhook"].json.body ?? $node["Webhook"].json; const pick = (...values) => values.find((value) => typeof value === 'string' && value.trim()); const eventType = pick(body.event_type, body.eventType, body.type, body.trigger?.type) || 'unknown'; const title = pick(body.title, body.meeting?.title, body.meeting_name, body.meeting?.name); const occurredAt = pick(body.occurred_at, body.occurredAt, body.started_at, body.meeting?.started_at, body.meeting?.start_time, body.timestamp); const stableId = pick(body.source_ref, body.meeting_id, body.meeting?.id, body.transcript_id, body.transcript?.id, body.conversation_id, body.conversation?.id, body.data?.meeting_id, body.data?.conversation_id); const slug = (title || 'call').toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, '-').replace(/^-+|-+$/g, '') || 'call'; const stamp = new Date(occurredAt || Date.now()); const iso = Number.isNaN(stamp.getTime()) ? new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 16).replace(/[:T]/g, '-') : stamp.toISOString().slice(0, 16).replace(/[:T]/g, '-'); const sourceRef = stableId ? `krisp:${stableId}` : `krisp:${iso}-${slug}`; return { status: 'error', error: $node["Call memory-api"].json.error?.message || $node["Call memory-api"].json.error?.description || 'memory_api_error', source_ref: sourceRef, event_type: eventType }; })() }}
